These small but thoughtful gifts are perfect to remind father figures how special they are, for Father's day and other occasions throughout the year. This Father's Day Keyring Gift Set contains a ballpoint pen in a plain colour wrap and an epoxy-coated metal keyring with a thoughtful slogan that reads "Greatest Dad" and "No.1 Dad".
